_comment: Gate 5 — AC-A11Y evidence. WCAG 2.x AA on key dashboard flows; severity/status NEVER conveyed by color alone. Graded by a fresh-context reviewer: initial FAIL (2 violations) -> fixed -> re-verified PASS.

severity_status_never_color_only.Sev: components/ui.tsx — Glyph (tri/diamond/square/circle) + text label per severity
severity_status_never_color_only.StatusPill: components/ui.tsx — distinct Glyph + text label per status
severity_status_never_color_only.BlastGraph: components/screens.tsx — node glyph (▲■◔✓) + status text; edges add ⊘/→ + dash style

keyboard_operability.fleet_row: FIXED — role=button + tabIndex={0} + onKeyDown (Enter/Space, preventDefault) + aria-label (was click-only <tr>)

accessible_names.drawer_close_button: FIXED — Btn now forwards ariaLabel; close uses aria-label={t('close',lang)} (was icon-only, unnamed)

html_lang: FIXED — document.documentElement.lang set to active locale on toggle (WCAG 3.1.2)
reviewer_verdict: PASS — keyboard-operable Fleet row + labeled drawer close button + html lang sync; no color-alone severity/status; remaining violations: none
known_lint_debt_pre_existing: biome useSemanticElements on the dial role=radio button and the role=dialog drawer, plus key={i} array keys — present in the Gate-5 commit, non-blocking, out of scope
